steps.title: Add the equations
steps.content: The $3x$ and $-3x$ terms cancel if you add the equations: $$3x+(-3x+y)=12+(-6).$$

steps.title: Read $y$ directly
steps.content: The left side becomes $y$, and the right side is $6$, so $$y=6.$$

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice B is correct. The other choices do not come from the cancellation step.
